messages.content: When is the best time to sow ragi in Karnataka?

Ragi (finger millet) is typically sown during the kharif season in Karnataka, ideally between mid-June and mid-July when the southwest monsoon is active. For rabi cultivation, sowing happens in late October.
My contact is officer.kumar@kvk.example.in or 9876543210. What pesticide do you recommend for stem borer in paddy?
For stem borer in paddy, neem-based formulations or carbofuran 3G granules are commonly recommended. Apply granular insecticide in standing water 25-30 days after transplanting.
What's the average yield of BPT 5204 paddy variety per hectare?
BPT 5204 (Sona Masuri) is a medium-duration paddy variety with an average yield of 4.5-5.5 tonnes per hectare under good management practices.
